(2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication, in the Official Gazette. 1. In the Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1986, for rules 6 and 7 the following rules shall be substituted, namely :- "6. Powers and duties of the Chairman- The Chairman shall, (a) be the overall Head of the Authority;. (b) preside over the meetings of the Authority. 7. Powers and duties of the Secretary-The Secretary shall, (a) sanction expenditure for contingencies, supplies and services and purchase of articles required for the working of the office of the Authority; (b) be responsible for implementation of the Plan Schemes of the Authority;.. (c) exercise such administrative and financial powers as may be necessary for the smooth functioning of the Authority; (d) issue receipts on behalf of the Authority for all moneys received under the Act; (e) maintain a proper record of the proceedings of the meetings of the Authority and decisions of those meetings; (f) be responsible for preparation of draft Annual report on the working of the Authority and its submission to Central Government after approval by the Authority on a date not later than the date specified in this behalf by the Central Government; (g) maintain a proper record of the register of exporters in accordance with the provisions of Chapter III of the Act; (h) attend all the meetings of the Authority and assist Chairman in implementing the decisions of the Authority; -- 3 of 4 -- V 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY ' [PART II—SEC. 3(H)] (J) the Secretary may, for the purpose of carrying out the functions of the Authority, assign duties to the officers and employees of the Authority. [F. No. 1/1/2008-EP(Agri-iV)] ANURAG SAXENA, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Official Gazette vide S.0.652(E) dated the 3rd" day of September, 1986 and the amendment rules were published by the following notifications, namely:- 1. S.O. 806(E), dated the 11th day of September, 1998 • 2. S.O. 238(E), dated the 22nd day of February, 2005. 3. S.O. 961(E), dated the 12th day of June, 2007 4. S.O. 2835(E), dated the 3rd December, 2008 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Deihi-l 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 4 of 4 --
